mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AI_MONTHLY_REPORT (USER_ID, TARGET_MONTH, SUMMARY, TOTAL_PAID, PAYMENT_COUNT) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetMonth}, #{summary}, #{totalPaid}, #{paymentCount}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE SUMMARY = VALUES(SUMMARY), TOTAL_PAID = VALUES(TOTAL_PAID), PAYMENT_COUNT = VALUES(PAYMENT_COUNT), CREATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM AI_MONTHLY_REPORT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND TARGET_MONTH = #{targetMonth}
SELECT * FROM AI_MONTHLY_REPORT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY TARGET_MONTH DESC LIMIT 12
